enemy.name: The Final Exam

intent.telegraph: Drill barrage (4 hits × 6 damage each = up to 24 total)

enemy.special: Phase 2 at 40% HP. Phase 2 intents include charge (12 bypass). Has quizPhases: 8-question rapid fire at 50% HP (already passed).

hand.name: Overheal
hand.description: Gain 10 block. Double if HP below 50%.

hand.name: Execute
hand.description: Bonus damage below 30% enemy HP. Enemy at ~41% HP — barely above threshold.

relics.name: Steel Skin
relics.description: Take 2 less damage from all sources (min 1).

notes: Boss fight, Final Exam in phase 2. Multi-attack 4×6 incoming — Steel Skin reduces each hit by 2, so 4×4=16 total. Player has 28 HP. Overheal: at <50% HP (28/80 = 35%), it doubles to 20 block, which blocks all 16 damage. But that's 2 AP. Reckless at 28 HP takes 3 self-damage + boss damage = risky. Execute doesn't get bonus (enemy at 41%). A genuine tactical decision: use Overheal (2ap, full defense) vs Reckless+something.
